# `/particle` Command
Creates a particle emitter

<table>
  <tr>
    <th>Permission Level</th>
    <td>Game Directors</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>Requires Cheats?</th>
    <td>Yes</td>
  </tr>
</table>

## Usage
### `/particle <effect: string> [position: x y z]`

## Arguments
- `effect`: string
- `position: x y z`: position
